delete.title: Delete Financing
delete.confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this financing?
delete.description: The financing "{name}" and all its associated data will be permanently deleted.

complete.title: Complete Financing
complete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to complete the financing of "{name}" with {entity}?
complete.remainingAmount: Remaining amount that will be registered as final payment:
complete.finalPaymentNote: A final payment with this amount will be automatically created and the debt will be marked as completed.

extraPayment.title: Add Custom Payment
extraPayment.description: Reduces remaining balance without marking installments as paid
extraPayment.exceedsMaxAmount: Amount cannot exceed the remaining balance ({maxAmount})
extraPayment.noRemainingAmount: No remaining balance. The debt is already fully paid.
extraPayment.strategyLabel: What do you want to do with installments?
extraPayment.strategyNoneDesc: Installments stay the same, you'll finish earlier than planned
extraPayment.strategyReduceInstallmentsDesc: Pay the same each month but for less time
extraPayment.strategyReduceAmountDesc: Pay less each month but for the same duration

historicalPayments.title: Previous installments
historicalPayments.description: This financing has {count} {count, plural, =1 {installment} other {installments}} from previous months totaling {amount}. Do you want to mark them as paid?

reactivate.title: Reactivate financing
reactivate.description: This financing is marked as completed. If you unmark a payment, it will return to in progress. Do you want to continue?
